scraped_bill_text.title: Ceremonial California Assembly Concurrent Resolution
scraped_bill_text.text: Assembly Concurrent Resolution No. 117—Relative to National Volunteer Month. WHEREAS, Volunteering is a vital part of the fabric of American society; and WHEREAS, Volunteers make immeasurable contributions to communities across California; and WHEREAS, The month of April has been designated as National Volunteer Month to recognize and celebrate the efforts of volunteers; now, therefore, be it Resolved by the Assembly of the State of California, the Senate thereof concurring, That the Legislature recognizes and celebrates the important contributions of volunteers during National Volunteer Month; and be it further Resolved, That the Chief Clerk of the Assembly transmit copies of this resolution to the author for appropriate distribution.

rag_chunks.content: Assembly Concurrent Resolution No. 117—Relative to National Volunteer Month. This resolution recognizes and celebrates volunteers during National Volunteer Month.
